text:
Once upon a time, in a town called Everwood, lived a lovable rabbit named Benny. Benny loved adventure, especially hiking through the ancient forest that surrounded Everwood.

One sunny morning, Benny woke up with an itch for exploration beyond the familiar meadows. His nose twitched as he sniffed the air—the forest was alive with the sound of birds singing. He decided to follow a trail that meandered through a thick part of the woods.

After hours of hopping and leaping, Benny uncovered a small cave hidden behind a thicket of brambles. Inside was a small clearing so peaceful it made Benny think of a hidden treasure. The cave walls were lined with old, yellowed leaves and mosses, and at its heart was an old wooden chest.

He scampered across the dusty ground toward it. It creaked as he opened it, revealing shiny trinkets and old coins. Benny pulled out a beautifully carved shell and noticed a tiny lock sticking out from under
